Single candle flame casts harsh shadows across pale face, eyes gleaming from darkness, everything else swallowed in black.

Crimson shaft pierces through rose-stained glass, painting bloody light across stone floor and illuminating dust motes.
Lightning flash freezes scene in stark white brilliance, followed by purple afterglow revealing silhouettes against storm clouds.
Sanguine glow rises from ritual circle below, casting red shadows upward across robed figures in profane ceremony.
Blood moon bathes entire cathedral interior in deep red luminescence, transforming white marble to crimson stone.
Ornate candelabra clusters warm golden light on velvet and skin, while vast cathedral darkness looms beyond intimate glow.
Figure carries lantern through endless corridor, creating isolated sphere of light surrounded by complete architectural darkness.
Fog transforms moonlight into soft silver haze, diffusing through graveyard creating ethereal glow around tombstones and angels.
Orange hearth-fire illuminates subject from one side only, half face glowing warm while other disappears into shadow.
Green-eyed creature emerges from void, twin points of luminous jade the only light source in suffocating blackness.
Purple spell-light erupts from outstretched hands, illuminating sorcerer's face from below with unnatural violet radiance and deep shadows.
Torchlight procession winds through vaulted hallway, creating rhythmic pools of amber separated by gulfs of impenetrable shadow.
Thunder-split sky provides brief white key-light, silhouetting gargoyles against roiling clouds before darkness returns completely.
Magic circle glows from floor beneath, casting theatrical underlight that transforms faces into skeletal masks of shadow.
Hellfire orange emanates from below frame, suggesting infernal depths while bathing figure in warm ominous glow from beneath.
Pre-dawn cold blue light creeps through windows, rendering stone tomb interior in lifeless pale illumination before sunrise.
Wet cobblestones mirror flickering gas-lamp above, doubling the struggling light while fog swallows everything beyond the stones.
Cathedral's western window admits dying amber sunset, creating singular golden shaft through incense smoke and gothic space.
Skull cradles single candle in eye socket, creating Caravaggesque light that reveals bone texture in dramatic chiaroscuro study.
Black lake surface mirrors full moon perfectly, doubling silver light while surrounding forest remains in absolute darkness.
Velvet-red rimlight outlines figure's silhouette from behind, leaving front in shadow while crimson halo glows around edges.
Multiple torches blaze in castle courtyard, creating dancing orange clusters against wet stone walls and midnight sky above.
Firelight inside cathedral reflects through stained glass outward, projecting colored patterns onto exterior fog in reverse illumination.
Bat swarm crosses moon's face in perfect silhouette, wings spread black against silver disc in classic gothic composition.
Smoke from censer catches single window beam, making light visible as geometric shaft cutting through architectural darkness.
Chandelier descends from vaulted ceiling, dozens of candles creating constellation of warm light in overwhelming shadowed space.
Lightning strikes reveal figure in doorway for split-second, white flash creating theatrical freeze-frame before thunder's darkness.
Red eyes glow from alcove shadow, twin crimson points hovering where face should be, illuminating nothing else.
Crimson beam through pointed arch window strikes altar directly, creating blood-light spotlight in otherwise darkened chapel sanctuary.
Single taper illuminates manuscript from side, creating severe diagonal shadow across monk's cowled face and parchment texture.
Moon pierces broken cathedral roof, silver column descending through darkness to illuminate abandoned stone altar in isolation.
Ruby glass fragment casts narrow blood-streak across praying hands, single finger glowing crimson against surrounding absolute black.
Lightning backlights figure in tower window, body pure silhouette against electric white sky for single frozen instant.

Crimson moon fills entire arch window behind throne, monarch silhouetted black against massive red disc in sky.
Three candles in triangular formation create competing shadows behind goblet, triple darkness radiating outward on stone table.
Hooded figure descends stairs with torch held high, creating moving sphere of orange that travels through black void.
Moonlight passes through cemetery mist creating soft silver nimbus around weeping angel statue, edges glowing ethereal white.
Orange firelight crawls up dungeon wall from below, illuminating chains and masonry in climbing gradient into blackness above.
Solitary candle stub on iron sconce throws jagged flame-shadows across vaulted ceiling, flickering wildly in unseen draft.
Full moon through lancet window creates narrow silver blade of light dissecting black crypt, bisecting stone sarcophagus precisely.
Stained glass rose-window scatters fragmented colored beams across nave floor, jewel-toned shafts piercing smoke-filled darkness.
Lightning silhouettes gargoyle against tower window for brilliant instant, leaving purple retinal ghost burned against total black.
Brazier's ritual coals glow deep crimson from corner, casting low blood-red shadows that crawl horizontally across chamber.
Entire landscape drinks blood-moon radiance, every surface rendered in shades of burgundy shadow and scarlet highlight.
Seven-armed candelabrum concentrates warm amber glow on velvet chair, creating intimate island surrounded by cathedral's vast darkness.
Lantern swings from hand of walking figure, light-sphere bobbing through colonnade revealing then concealing sequential pillars.
Graveyard fog diffuses moonbeam into soft silver wash, headstones emerging as ghostly shapes from luminous mist.
